name: Broadway Jewelry & Pawn
description_short: Colorado-based pawn shop offering collateral loans, jewelry sales, firearms, and layaway services. Located in Littleton with experienced staff and a mission to provide friendly, quality service.
description_long:
Broadway Jewelry & Pawn is a Colorado pawn shop located in Littleton, established as a business entity under Krabbe Corp in 2020, though its roots in the pawn industry trace back earlier. Owner Jonathan Krabbe is a Colorado native with a business degree from the University of Denver and over 15 years of industry experience dating to 2005. The shop operates under the tagline "Colorado's Friendly Pawn Shop" and emphasizes customer service and a comfortable atmosphere.

The business offers traditional pawn services including collateral-based loans ("Loan / Buy" section), jewelry sales and watch repair expertise, firearms transactions, and layaway/payment plan options. They maintain an online shop inventory accessible through their website, indicating both in-person and e-commerce presence. The team includes bilingual staff (English/Spanish) and specialized knowledge across firearms, jewelry, electronics, tools, and sporting goods. Their website features dedicated sections for each major product category.

Broadway Jewelry & Pawn distinguishes itself through personalized customer experience, with named staff members highlighted on their About page and friendly shop mascots ("Mutt" and "Mazi"). The business emphasizes being Colorado-native owned with longevity in the industry—Andy Garcia has been with the shop since 2012, and Sherri Krabbe brings specialized jewelry and watch repair experience. They explicitly state their mission is "to set the standard for what people should expect from a pawn shop."

As a traditional pawn shop, this business primarily serves customers needing quick, collateral-based cash access rather than credit-based lending. Their lending terms, interest rates, and APRs are not disclosed on the website. Operating hours are limited (closed Sundays, 6pm weekday closing), which may not accommodate all customer schedules. The business model inherently requires customers to pledge personal property, which carries risk of forfeiture if loans aren't repaid.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Established Colorado-native ownership with 15+ years of industry experience (owner since 2005, shop ownership since 2020)
Bilingual staff (English/Spanish) with Andy Garcia as experienced pawn broker since 2012
Specialized expertise in jewelry repair and watch repair services, not just resale
Multiple product categories including firearms, jewelry, electronics, tools, and sporting goods
Online inventory and e-commerce capability through website, expanding access beyond in-store
Transparent team bios and mission statement emphasizing customer service quality
Extended weekday hours (9am-6pm Monday-Friday) for working customers
cons: No disclosed lending terms, interest rates, or APRs on website—customers must contact to learn costs
Limited hours (closed Sundays, 6pm closing weekdays) may not accommodate all customer schedules
Collateral-based lending requires customers to pledge personal property with forfeiture risk
No online loan application or rate pre-qualification tool visible on website
Limited customer reviews or ratings information provided to assess service quality
best_for: Customers needing quick cash against jewelry, firearms, or electronics they own
Spanish-speaking customers seeking bilingual pawn services in the Denver metro area
Watch or jewelry owners needing appraisal, repair, or sale services
Colorado residents seeking collateral loans as an alternative to credit-based lending
diagnosis: Broadway Jewelry & Pawn is best for Colorado residents needing fast, collateral-based cash access without credit checks, particularly those with jewelry, firearms, or electronics to pledge. The main caveat is that pawn loans require surrendering personal property and carry forfeiture risk if not repaid, and the website does not disclose specific lending terms, rates, or repayment terms that should be clarified before engaging.
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
